mapper.select:
SELECT CAST('USER' AS CHAR CHARACTER SET utf8mb4) COLLATE utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci AS category, user_id AS id, name COLLATE utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci AS title, CONCAT_WS(' | ', nickname COLLATE utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci, email COLLATE utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci, user_id COLLATE utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci ) AS subtext, CASE WHEN CHAR_LENGTH(REGEXP_REPLACE(introduction, '<[^>]*>', '')) > 100 THEN CONCAT(LEFT(REGEXP_REPLACE(introduction, '<[^>]*>', ''), 100), '...') ELSE REGEXP_REPLACE(introduction, '<[^>]*>', '') END AS content FROM users WHERE name COLLATE utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR user_id COLLATE utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR nickname COLLATE utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR email COLLATE utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
UNION ALL
SELECT CAST('REVIEW' AS CHAR CHARACTER SET utf8mb4) COLLATE utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci AS category, CAST(review_id AS CHAR CHARACTER SET utf8mb4) COLLATE utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci AS id, review_title COLLATE utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci AS title, CONCAT_WS(' | ', user_id COLLATE utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci, isbn COLLATE utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci, category COLLATE utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci ) AS subtext, CASE WHEN CHAR_LENGTH(REGEXP_REPLACE(review_content, '<[^>]*>', '')) > 100 THEN CONCAT(LEFT(REGEXP_REPLACE(review_content, '<[^>]*>', ''), 100), '...') ELSE REGEXP_REPLACE(review_content, '<[^>]*>', '') END AS content FROM reviews WHERE review_title COLLATE utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR review_content COLLATE utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR isbn COLLATE utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR category COLLATE utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
UNION ALL
SELECT CAST('COMMENT' AS CHAR CHARACTER SET utf8mb4) COLLATE utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci AS category, CAST(c.comment_id AS CHAR CHARACTER SET utf8mb4) COLLATE utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci AS id, CASE WHEN CHAR_LENGTH(REGEXP_REPLACE(c.content, '<[^>]*>', '')) > 100 THEN CONCAT(LEFT(REGEXP_REPLACE(c.content, '<[^>]*>', ''), 100), '...') ELSE REGEXP_REPLACE(c.content, '<[^>]*>', '') END AS title, r.review_title COLLATE utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci AS subtext, CONCAT_WS(' | ', u.nickname COLLATE utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci, c.user_id COLLATE utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci ) AS content FROM review_comments c JOIN reviews r ON c.review_id = r.review_id JOIN users u ON c.user_id = u.user_id WHERE c.content COLLATE utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR r.review_title COLLATE utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.nickname COLLATE utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
ORDER BY category
